summary: P2 Features Testing Complete - Redemption Popup with Geofenced QR and Weekly Recap Premium Feature. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: RedemptionPopup correctly shows standalone popup (not full page modal)
Geofence status correctly shows 'You're in range!' when user is within 1 mile
QR code is generated with unique code format: SR-{offerId}-{timestamp}-{random}
Protected QR Code notice displayed with screenshot blocking message
Weekly Recap card shows in Profile for all users with PREMIUM badge
Basic users see premium upsell modal with 'Upgrade to Premium' button
Offer redemption correctly awards gems and XP
Backend /api/weekly-recap returns all required stats fields
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
seed_data_creation: User has redeemed offers 1, 2, 3 during testing. Offer 4 (SnapRoad Partner Deal) still available.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features (Redemption Popup, Geofenced QR, Weekly Recap) complete. User is Basic plan. Weekly Recap shows premium upsell. Offers 1-3 redeemed, offer 4 available.

redemption_popup.standalone_popup: Opens as overlay popup, not full page modal

geofence_status.in_range: Shows 'You're in range!' when within 1 mile
geofence_status.out_of_range: Shows distance in miles when outside range

weekly_recap.profile_card: Weekly Recap card visible in Profile with PREMIUM badge

offer_redemption.gems_awarded: Correct gems based on offer base_gems * gem_multiplier

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. Weekly recap stats are randomized. QR codes are generated client-side.
